title: Talk title here
speaker: Speaker name
event: Conference, seminar series, or workshop name
location: City, Country
date: 2025-01-01
type: Invited
# embed: a YouTube or Google Drive video URL. Required for the talk to appear on the Talks page.
# YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ID  or  https://youtu.be/ID
# Drive (file must be shared "anyone with the link"): https://drive.google.com/file/d/ID/view
embed:
# thumbnail (optional): a custom image to show instead of the auto-generated one.
# Recommended for Drive videos, whose auto-thumbnails are unreliable. Use a 16:9 image.
# e.g. /assets/images/talks/my-talk.jpg  (or an external https URL)
thumbnail:
